name: Robin Hickenlooper
subject: the right decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
A lot has happened in August. And there were a lot of conversations and thought for me and John about the future direction. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e0/691c9bd/6e684ad3/11a7b84d/403021351/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

A lot has happened in August. And there were a lot of conversations between John and me about the next step.

Here's where we kept landing: John has always sought to bring people together to achieve meaningful, progressive change. And in August, it became clear that running for the U.S. Senate was the best way to achieve that. And he is all in.

**Now, we 're asking you to be part of this from the start.**

[**_What we can raise before the first monthly fundraising deadline of this campaign is essential to building an organization that can take on Cory Gardner and his special interest allies. Can you chip in today?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190829_RH_20190829-fr-RH-EOM2-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

The playing field is very different for John now. Cory Gardner has built a reputation as a yes-man to Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump. He's amassed nearly $5 million in the bank, and you know they'll do whatever it takes to hold on to this seat.

John and I know we're in for some nasty attacks from the other side. But this team gives us strength. And at deadlines like this, we need to prove we're ready to fight back.

[**_John can win this race --with your help. Are you in?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190829_RH_20190829-fr-RH-EOM2-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Robin [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190829_RH_20190829-fr-RH-EOM2-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e0/691c9bd/6e684ad3/11a7b849/403021351/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e0/691c9bd/6e684ad3/11a7b846/403021351/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e0/691c9bd/6e684ad3/11a7b847/403021351/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e0/691c9bd/6e684ad3/11a7b844/403021351/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e0/691c9bd/6e684ad3/11a7b845/403021351/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e0/691c9bd/6e684ad3/11a7b842/403021351/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e0/691c9bd/6e684ad3/11a7b849/403021351/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Andrea
subject: so proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
I love my husband.

Every day I watch him go out into the world to make it a better place for all of us.

Every night I watch him wrestle with the burdens of millions of people he will never meet.

Tim truly cares, and it makes me so proud of him and the work he's doing.

[**Tomorrow, Tim goes back on the road to speak with the American people and share his plans for a new America. Would you please contribute to his campaign today and help him speak with as many folks as possible?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-ourplan?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190829_2_2&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Tomorrow+Tim+goes+back+on+the+road+to+sp&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190829_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190829_2_2")

I am so happy you all are getting the chance to see the Tim that I've known for years. A kind, caring, hard-working person, who strives every day to make the world a better place.

To be honest, I'd love to have him all to myself. But I know he can do so much good for so many people by going out on the campaign trail.

[**Your support helps even more people meet the Tim I know and love. If you 're able, please contribute to his campaign today by clicking HERE.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-ourplan?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190829_2_2&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Your+support+helps+even+more+people+meet&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190829_2_2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190829_2_2")

I can't thank you enough for making this campaign possible.

All the best,

Andrea

| Now you may not realize it from this image, but we were actually ahead of one of the candidates in this poll. **In fact -- in several of the polls released this week -- we have been leading more than one of the candidates in this graphic.** I’ll admit I’ve never been a politician before, but the treatment of our rising national poll results has been odd and confusing. That said, this tells me one thing -- **it’s important for us to send a message before the September debate that our movement is real and growing. And, most importantly, cannot be ignored.** [We can send a giant message to everyone watching if we blow past our August fundraising goals, but that would take everyone on this team pitching in everything they can. Can I count on you to rush a contribution now?](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQ02lV0-2B-2FAsZCh9lzrV5waF336SCiCpNhiC1bHSNpM7K2o-2BsMMqjzCtiB-2F-2BhqlGSYQonz8-2FV3OUnWyoI8ibugGv-2BRD3S0n6CSatauTzedCZZjjvuqchp1gIA6DR4F0Jn-2BFB9-2FWcgt8RbjqjUfNKV7blydj62BgrL9vzggFI0yqsifa464Vr-2Fs7Rs9JkONq2QRCVmoHwbtCNFAZKaza9TitoGJlnys9WxFU-2BN-2FYeT-2FOy5vv7WzB9bNE0ZZdsnFb86aIDUXCQ4VkW23M8RKGofblUA-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2FBcMmpVpKG9hNm3cK2W2VxwYrr2GNRzF1l9-2BLWqmK968jdnjFesqBKMMz-2Fy50KmmEDbS2i4aoSOr7qRPHUb-2FikIvZEPqtpzw3NfC-2B-2Bbc2yYtUw27GnvT3nZI7Pt9Cj1Fd5eNzO8qUE3-2BFb5o3D0QELH0GSeioYc2z6Glr6zVvsrCY9yP45MnftU78nRHJ3gq3af4nmK5XWGJJsNFav-2FAquN4fT-2FlPczMTSRrZKSXWV8j8w74P6nW5XYao2cTgpbCkhvJ2Mowlbb41eMQlyBgsZe-2Bqs4WB-2FZruilutcA-2FBAQKMhPMzpv2r8bKjMVOPA7ylaMK0EBG42FwdM5Oj-2BM-2BMQw-3D-3D)

| If we were to beat expectations for August fundraising ahead of the next debate, we would force the networks and everyone in the media to pay attention and increase coverage of our campaign. This would also allow new voters to hear our message and be introduced to me as one of the leading candidates. The trend of this campaign is already very positive -- think where we could be if we received the same level of coverage as folks like Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Joe Biden. **We must prove to everyone this is a movement that can’t be ignored. And the power to do that is in your hands now.** [Make a contribution now so we can blow past our August fundraising goals and show everyone the power of this campaign.](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQ02lV0-2B-2FAsZCh9lzrV5waF336SCiCpNhiC1bHSNpM7K2o-2BsMMqjzCtiB-2F-2BhqlGSYQonz8-2FV3OUnWyoI8ibugGv-2BRD3S0n6CSatauTzedCZZjjvuqchp1gIA6DR4F0Jn-2BFMRcWRUI-2FB5MAJ0MukI-2B8tfsyZWUrCFTKtTuc9xpVPMRMtasxGF56n0feysGF85a2MP5vZysIytNwxq19L7OEVuzcQqRAPxqaIun6jNaS5w8e28esxtOVb9T1MqFqDdiWv19qV4ZvCC61RlxAxkhkWo-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2FBcMmpVpKG9hNm3cK2W2VxwYrr2GNRzF1l9-2BLWqmK968jdnjFesqBKMMz-2Fy50KmmEDbS2i4aoSOr7qRPHUb-2FikIvZEPqtpzw3NfC-2B-2Bbc2yYtUw27GnvT3nZI7Pt9Cj1Fd5eNzO8qUE3-2BFb5o3D0QELNez3j1YjEEVt0xjE3Eb0N6-2FwWIQF1LlY0ZMLfrpN1H2JnLCPd-2Btw51IFD19mwnyPieZtmBzZ-2BRLk5IGhXPrQ-2FVv-2F3-2Ff0YoP9bR1-2B3FzUA4XCfE2hiNCspRaaObO-2FogzvQecN1aFuW23KmPKyTUMybpCx1XDyMJVqTlwb1Iy37H1Ztt746Acv6zyWEaFdhmyQA-3D-3D)

subject: President Trump just established the U.S. Space Command
body:
This afternoon, the Secretary of Defense established the United States Space Command to ensure America’s continued dominance in space. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d78275afa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 29, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump's Message on Hurricane Dorian**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c063dcb81&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
# **Establishing the U.S. Space Command**

**This afternoon,** at the direction of President Donald J. Trump, the Secretary of Defense established the United States Space Command to ensure America’s continued dominance in space. President Trump announced the news from the Rose Garden.

**“The dangers** to our country constantly evolve, and so must we,” the President said. “Now, those who wish to harm the United States, who seek to challenge us in the ultimate high ground of space—it's going to be a whole different ballgame.”

**The United States** is reliant on space for everything from the vital military systems that protect us to widely used consumer systems that fuel our economy. While America has the strongest military in the world, failure to act now could allow our adversaries to overcome that competitive advantage and deny us access to the space domain.

**🎬** **Watch:**[President Trump establishes the U.S. Space Command](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ad8beb04d1&e=3ee4985eea)

**Last week,** at the sixth meeting of the National Space Council, Vice President Mike Pence spoke at length about America’s next great mission to lead the world once again in human space exploration. “As we lead in American innovation and entrepreneurship in space, we also must lead in security,” the Vice President said.

**To that end,** President Trump installed four-star General John “Jay” Raymond today as the first leader of the revived U.S. Space Command. The newest of 11 unified commands within the Department of Defense, USSPACECOM will employ assigned forces from every branch of the military to achieve vital victories in space.

**There’s no better** person to lead this charge than Gen. Raymond. As the current commander of the Air Force Space Command, Gen. Raymond leads an incredible team of about 26,000 space professionals worldwide. His deep experience in the field includes serving in the United States Air Force for more than 34 years, and in June, the Senate unanimously confirmed him as our first Commander of the U.S. Space Command.

[President Trump revives the United States Space Command.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=80fba4f527&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Statement from Press Secretary Grisham**
---
| **Today, the Inspector General’s Office** released its report on former FBI Director James Comey’s handling of sensitive information on the job. White House Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham released [the following statement](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3922cfb2ba&e=3ee4985eea):

| | _James Comey is a proven liar and leaker. The Inspector General’s report shows Comey violated the most basic obligations of confidentiality that he owed to the United States Government and to the American people, “in order to achieve a personally desired outcome.” Because Comey shamefully leaked information to the press—in blatant violation of FBI policies—the Nation was forced to endure the baseless politically motivated, two-year witch hunt. Comey disgraced himself and his office to further a personal political agenda, and this report further confirms that fact._ |
---|---|---
|
---
|

body:
Peter,
As you remember, **in early August I announced that I would send "command coins" (from my Battle Group command) to the two supporters who gathered the most contributions by August 26**. **The exceptional winners of the coins are Shelly (1st place), and David and Joseph (2nd place tie).** Shelly, David, and Joseph, **congratulations and thank you so much** for your hard work. Your coins are on their way to you!
As we edge our way to the Fall debates, the ground game here in Iowa is going extremely well. We're doing daily events, shaking hands, discussing issues and passing out brochures — with **LOTS of Iowa press**. Our **grassroots support grows every day**. We are **en route to New Hampshire after Labor Day** weekend, with additional **stops in three other states** coming up.

name: Hope Walz
subject: Before classes start
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| Hi there, Hope Walz here! It's almost fall, and next week I'm starting my first year at the University of Minnesota (GO GOPHERS!!). But before my classes pick up, I wanted to reach out one more time to emphasize something really important. It's undeniable that Minnesota is at the top of Trump's list going into 2020. He knows that if he's successful in flipping us red, he'll be re-elected. Here's what that means for us: Trump and his right-wing allies are going to pour record-breaking sums of money into our state, and that could have devastating consequences down the entire ballot. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/00JgWROoIMCCIvh1fE9_CGUzgMjpSC6vTIz9CVl2YDk=/9yXT5daS0A-B2SCJNN9TyEVpuUs4udDjW3tM8fz595g=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
Hi there,
Hope Walz here! It's almost fall, and next week I'm starting my first year at the University of Minnesota (GO GOPHERS!!). But before my classes pick up, I wanted to reach out one more time to emphasize something really important.
It's undeniable that Minnesota is at the top of Trump's list going into 2020. He knows that if he's successful in flipping us red, he'll be re-elected.
_Here 's what that means for us:_ Trump and his right-wing allies are going to pour record-breaking sums of money into our state, and that could have devastating consequences down the entire ballot.
My dad has always been a team player (and never one to back down from a challenge). He understands the role he has, and over the past several months, I've seen first-hand the work he's doing with his campaign to prepare for the unbelievable battle ahead.
They're meeting with activists, community leaders, and candidates in every corner of the state, laying the groundwork to take back the Minnesota Senate, connecting with voters directly, and so much more.
**Their work is essential, and it 's only possible if they continue hitting their budget targets. This morning, I reached out to Berrett (my dad's campaign finance director) and he said they're still more than $4,300 short of their August goal. [Their deadline is TOMORROW. Will you please make a contribution of $5 or more so they can make up the difference?](https://act.myngp.com/el/00JgWROoIMCCIvh1fE9_CGUzgMjpSC6vTIz9CVl2YDk=/9yXT5daS0A-B2SCJNN9TyEVpuUs4udDjW3tM8fz595g=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
****[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/00JgWROoIMCCIvh1fE9_CGUzgMjpSC6vTIz9CVl2YDk=/9yXT5daS0A-B2SCJNN9TyEVpuUs4udDjW3tM8fz595g=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-p)****
****[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/00JgWROoIMCCIvh1fE9_CGUzgMjpSC6vTIz9CVl2YDk=/9yXT5daS0A-B2SCJNN9TyEVpuUs4udDjW3tM8fz595g=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-p)****
****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/00JgWROoIMCCIvh1fE9_CGUzgMjpSC6vTIz9CVl2YDk=/9yXT5daS0A-B2SCJNN9TyEVpuUs4udDjW3tM8fz595g=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-p)****
****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/00JgWROoIMCCIvh1fE9_CGUzgMjpSC6vTIz9CVl2YDk=/9yXT5daS0A-B2SCJNN9TyEVpuUs4udDjW3tM8fz595g=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-p)****
****[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/00JgWROoIMCCIvh1fE9_CGUzgMjpSC6vTIz9CVl2YDk=/9yXT5daS0A-B2SCJNN9TyEVpuUs4udDjW3tM8fz595g=?refcode=_other-p)****
We all worked together to build one of the strongest grassroots campaigns in Minnesota history in 2018. Now we need to throw our full weight behind supporting our allies up and down the ticket and keeping Minnesota blue.
**It 's not going to be easy, but I believe in this movement, this team, and most importantly, our shared vision of One Minnesota. [Please, make a contribution that works for you today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/00JgWROoIMCCIvh1fE9_CGUzgMjpSC6vTIz9CVl2YDk=/9yXT5daS0A-B2SCJNN9TyEVpuUs4udDjW3tM8fz595g=?refcode=body&amount=25.00)**
Thanks for reading!
Hope Walz
P.S.: On top of it all, my dad still managed to find the time to carry an incredible amount of boxes up and down the stairs to help me this week! Here's a photo from move in day:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/00JgWROoIMCCIvh1fE9_CGUzgMjpSC6vTIz9CVl2YDk=/9yXT5daS0A-B2SCJNN9TyEVpuUs4udDjW3tM8fz595g=?refcode=photo&amount=25.00)

body:

| Friend,
It's been an exciting month!
First, Nicole made the first round of the Republican Congressional Committee's 2020 Young Guns program.
Then she was selected to meet with national leaders, including House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy and Ivanka Trump, to help shape the party's policy agenda.
And last week, our campaign was named a top 10 race by The Washington Post.
Our early success is because of supporters like you who are helping us build momentum and spread the word that New York City deserves one common sense voice in Washington and we have a winning candidate!

clean_body: It’s been an exciting month! Tomorrow is our end of month deadline and we are $5425 shy of our goal. | | | | | | == | | | Friend, It's been an exciting month! First, Nicole made the first round of the Republican Congressional Committee's 2020 Young Guns program. Then she was selected to meet with national leaders, including House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy and Ivanka Trump, to help shape the party's policy agenda. And last week, our campaign was named a top 10 race by The Washington Post. Our early success is because of supporters like you who are helping us build momentum and spread the word that New York City deserves one common sense voice in Washington and we have a winning candidate! == == | | | | | == | | == | | == | | | == | | == | | == | | | == ==, ==, ==, == == == | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == Team Nicole | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) | | | == == == | | Nicole for New York (FEDERAL) | PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306 | | Sent by mailto:info@nicoleforny.com

Peter,
Tomorrow marks the end of August, and we are on track to have our strongest month yet. We are just **$4,948.57** away from hitting our monthly goal, and I want to take a brief moment to explain why these goals are so important.
When we hit or miss a goal, it impacts how much time I get to spend out in the district with voters and listening to their needs for our community. And I would much rather be out there than dialing for dollars and worrying about fundraising numbers.
My GOP opponent has his dark-money allies behind him, but I have you, Peter**. So I’m counting on you to come through now and give before our end-of-month deadline – whatever you can – and your gift will be matched.**

name: =?utf-8?q?Bill=E2=80=99s_iPhone?=
subject: fwd: Trump is attacking us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
Friend — sorry for the Friday night email but this is a critical moment for our campaign. We’ve got Trump on the ropes and we want to keep him there. My team tells me we need to raise another $6,009 before midnight Saturday if we want to hire more staff. Let me tell you, we need all the help we can get. Can you chip in right now to help us reach our goal? You can use this secure link right here: **[CLICK HERE](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARyEC5luDj7uzhtIR4EImczP&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_fr_eom_2&n=1)** Thanks,
Bill Sent from my iPhone \---- Forwarded message ---- **From** : Team Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : August 29, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARyEC5luDj7uzhtIR4EImczP&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_fr_eom_2&n=2) Friend — once again Donald Trump is showing _**he’s afraid of our movement**_. Earlier this week he went on another one of his unhinged Twitter rants about his challengers. Here’s what he said: [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARyEC5luDj7uzhtIR4EImczP&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_fr_eom_2&n=3) Talk about a typical Trump cheap shot. Seems like he’s referring to the time, _more than 20 years ago_ , when Governor Weld fell ill with the flu while receiving an Honorary Degree at a prestigious college. Cheap shot aside, if you dig a little deeper it's clear these tweets mean we’re getting under his skin. It means we have to keep the momentum going.**It means we’ve got a shot to beat him.** **But we can’t do it alone — we’re relying on supporters like you to help carry us through this campaign.** We don’t have the luxury of Donald Trump’s loose morals, wealthy friends, and cabal of cronies willing to go along with just about any corrupt deal in exchange for campaign donations. We’re looking to raise another **$12,553** from supporters like you by **midnight Saturday** if we want to hit our critical end-of-month fundraising goal and continue to build on the momentum we’ve established in New Hampshire, Iowa, and around the country. If we don’t hit this goal, we risk losing ground, and **having to put off hiring more staff that will help us reach out to voters in critical early primary states.** [**Can you be one of the first ten donors to help us reach our critical end-of-month goal by donating $10, $20, or whatever you can today?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARyEC5luDj7uzhtIR4EImczP&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_fr_eom_2&n=4) Thanks for helping us get there,
Team Weld | | [HELP US HIRE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARyEC5luDj7uzhtIR4EImczP&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_fr_eom_2&n=5)
---
Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.weld2020.org/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_fr_eom_2&n=6).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_fr_eom_2&n=7) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_fr_eom_2&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_fr_eom_2&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Meg
subject: We've got a match
body:
|
---
We officially know who we're up against this fall, and this race is winnable.
Friend,

We wanted to make sure you saw our last email. We officially know who we're up against this fall, and this race is _winnable_. Jim has what it takes to go all the way in November, and a group of our supporters agree. They are going to **MATCH every dollar we raise online through the rest of August. Can you chip in right now to help us get a leg up?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/6eLm2mGEmZs0BB6qcJMZlYsFv5eRdMEvC5WSEHJ5cSM=/lcWC-AwpAQV7i_qFwt23ep647YrZBFtSM9R68phI7-U=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190830nd&amount=5)**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/6eLm2mGEmZs0BB6qcJMZlYsFv5eRdMEvC5WSEHJ5cSM=/lcWC-AwpAQV7i_qFwt23ep647YrZBFtSM9R68phI7-U=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190830nd&amount=10)**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/6eLm2mGEmZs0BB6qcJMZlYsFv5eRdMEvC5WSEHJ5cSM=/lcWC-AwpAQV7i_qFwt23ep647YrZBFtSM9R68phI7-U=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190830nd&amount=25)**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/6eLm2mGEmZs0BB6qcJMZlYsFv5eRdMEvC5WSEHJ5cSM=/lcWC-AwpAQV7i_qFwt23ep647YrZBFtSM9R68phI7-U=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190830nd&amount=50)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/6eLm2mGEmZs0BB6qcJMZlYsFv5eRdMEvC5WSEHJ5cSM=/lcWC-AwpAQV7i_qFwt23ep647YrZBFtSM9R68phI7-U=?refcode=20190830nd)**
There is a clear choice in this race for governor. Tate Reeves will continue to prioritize out-of-state corporations and special interests to the detriment of Mississippi. Jim has always stood up for working families as Attorney General, and will continue to do so as governor.

We have our first end-of-the-month fundraising deadline of the general election in less than 48 hours, and it is critical that we reach our goals. We need to be able to keep spreading Jim's plan for Mississippi across every corner of the state -- which means your help is crucial to our victory in November. **[With every dollar donated through the end of the month MATCHED, can we count on you to chip in right now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/6eLm2mGEmZs0BB6qcJMZlYsFv5eRdMEvC5WSEHJ5cSM=/lcWC-AwpAQV7i_qFwt23ep647YrZBFtSM9R68phI7-U=?refcode=20190830nd&amount=10)**

Thanks,
Meg

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: There’s so much more at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5gLkZaYiSW83Gb6r2u8nK6O1VLZkDnqOkVXtjINWgU=/GDbaFx2EwZbfbKo_N_Vb2NxcvMmpZVFaadY5K7lPUWo=?refcode=20190830email)

Friend,
With wall-to-wall coverage of the Presidential campaigns, our nation is diving headfirst into the 2020 elections. But we must remember there's so much more at stake: **2020 also means a chance to flip key House seats from red-to-blue -- and ours is one of them!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5gLkZaYiSW83Gb6r2u8nK6O1VLZkDnqOkVXtjINWgU=/GDbaFx2EwZbfbKo_N_Vb2NxcvMmpZVFaadY5K7lPUWo=?refcode=20190830email)

The Cook Political Report just moved our race from Lean Republican to a complete toss up. [**This campaign is just heating up, but we need your support to keep this incredible momentum going. Will you chip in $22 now to flip TX-22 blue? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5gLkZaYiSW83Gb6r2u8nK6O1VLZkDnqOkVXtjINWgU=/GDbaFx2EwZbfbKo_N_Vb2NxcvMmpZVFaadY5K7lPUWo=?refcode=20190830email)

**[DONATE $22 NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5gLkZaYiSW83Gb6r2u8nK6O1VLZkDnqOkVXtjINWgU=/GDbaFx2EwZbfbKo_N_Vb2NxcvMmpZVFaadY5K7lPUWo=?refcode=20190830email)**
---

When I first ran against the Republican incumbent in 2018, many didn't think we had a fighting chance. We ended up coming within 14,000 votes of flipping the district, less than 5%. This time, we're ready to win that fight.
[**Together, we 've stood against the odds and together we'll keep growing this momentum. Donate now to help power us past the finish line! >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5gLkZaYiSW83Gb6r2u8nK6O1VLZkDnqOkVXtjINWgU=/GDbaFx2EwZbfbKo_N_Vb2NxcvMmpZVFaadY5K7lPUWo=?refcode=20190830email)

**[DONATE NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5gLkZaYiSW83Gb6r2u8nK6O1VLZkDnqOkVXtjINWgU=/GDbaFx2EwZbfbKo_N_Vb2NxcvMmpZVFaadY5K7lPUWo=?refcode=20190830email)**
---

In gratitude,
Sri Preston Kulkarni

Sri for Congress PO Box 898 Sugar Land TX 77478 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

And Democrats have no shot to win without a victory in New Mexico.** My friend Ben Ray is up against a critical end-of-month deadline in 24 hours. name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Conservatives, we need your help
body:
Americans like you like you have been vital to preserving this message [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=7e52b578df6a403ba96d5f4fccdf3620&_e=qhY3NB8W3QXB2FeujpZcqiQ6neKwtvm2jrUGnvUnKAFrUPN3HHtBpECPuduRvDBqztjPYIhU0DEx_QuKT3o4XbWttkBe_eUflvW3pAPWrooMRnYRhzjxRCpCPsjb5ElWWVFA48i_RvyQbKGEGB9I0zMSvyjjCMzHR6uIcp4SQVqcEAX3-roDirBiqVMsgNTMICG_Yn0YD2I4jSTNJi7N_lHlOCi2yM1jCferpDSR7v_D23r3ZMjyhfG5PEzVqxoCd8qX_bZVwC1fPw70ANCLwuC-hULNB5FEn4HY1F5Pfq0Ol53V-Fwb3o8a1P8HY8S749tCfUzJaKx6OknxXK6RJq-FlXsymcUze3q-QRzHgi8%3D) Hi Everyone, As a supporter of America Next, you know just how important it is to remind the nation what conservatives truly stand for, not just what we oppose. Americans like you like you have been vital to preserving this message, and we can only continue to spread it nationwide with your help. That’s why we have set an ambitious goal of raising $5,000 in the next 48 hours, one that you can help us reach. body:

| Team, we'll get right to the point. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow night at MIDNIGHT. We just ran the numbers. Right now, we're falling short of our $450,000 target. August is a hard month to raise money and we rely on grassroots donors like you to help us reach our goals. But right now, we're worried that we might miss our goal. We can make up the ground we've lost -- **but only with your help.** **[By donating for the first time, you'll help us meet one of our biggest fundraising goals yet. name: Greg Stanton
subject: I hope Congress took note of Tuesday's election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**On Tuesday, Phoenix voters turned out to _overwhelmingly_ support building out a better transportation system in our communities. **

I'm going to return to Congress with a clear message for my colleagues -- Arizonans want us to come together to pass infrastructure funding so we can repair our roads, improve bus service, fix our bridges, and build out our light rail system.

**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2ZVfPiXHFknlmQLVxlmBZqc8YpjWxPcYOKDSJEFoHbs=/UsN5zHLDd8DeTh_1zGRYdrYyhqaIQZMTjFYpVu6Kesw=?refcode=X_083019_EOM_C&amount=25.00&recurring=auto)**

I am proud to serve on the House Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure.

I pledge to continue working with my bipartisan committee colleagues to pass a commonsense agenda to build out our nation's infrastructure system.

subject: I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I'm not running to be a president who only pays attention to the wealthy and well-connected. I'm running to be everybody's president. My time is not for sale, and every supporter has an equal place... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529229/45c30650/125262dc5/668678d6/1864648777/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

There's only one way we're raising money for this campaign.

I'm not hosting any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't determine the amount of time they can spend with me, or with any presidential candidate.

I'm not counting on a billionaire to fund a Super PAC for me -- because the Democratic primary can't just be one more plaything for the rich and powerful.

I'm not taking a dime from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests.

Instead, we're building a true grassroots campaign with grassroots donors -- because that's the only way we'll create a movement strong enough to make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

**[I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: Before tomorrow's end-of-month fundraising deadline, will you make your first donation to our campaign? $3 or whatever you can chip in would make a huge difference. I can't do this without you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529229/45c30650/125262dc5/668678d9/1864648777/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk5OEZfRU9NX05GRl9FXzIwMTkwODMwX1YxUzNfUF9UMiJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI98F_EOM_NFF_E_20190830_V1S3_P_T2")**

>
On a typical presidential campaign, my team would be flying me from big city to big city to scoop up as many big fat checks as possible.

Wealthy donors might come see me at fancy receptions in hedge fund offices. They'd sip champagne, nibble on shrimp cocktail, and try to convince me that the tax loophole that just so happens to pad their pockets is also good for the whole country.

But I'm not running to be a president who only pays attention to the wealthy and well-connected.

I'm running to be everybody's president. My time is not for sale, and every supporter has an equal place in our movement.

Instead of getting cozy with the rich and powerful, I'll keep traveling across the country for town halls, meet-and-greets, and house parties. Anyone's welcome to come -- no big check required.

If you ask me, that's what a campaign for president should be all about. Talking with people, in their hometowns, about real solutions to real problems. Getting organized at the grassroots level to make change happen.

But this type of campaign is only possible if everyone who is able pitches in what they can.

I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy, but I can't do it alone. This is how we'll stop Washington from only answering to the beck and call of billionaires and giant corporations -- one grassroots donation at a time.

**Without the backing of wealthy donors at stuffy private fundraisers, I truly need your help to build this grassroots movement for big, structural change.**

**Let's keep building something incredible together. Please make your first contribution before tomorrow 's midnight deadline.**

**[https://my.elizabethwarren.com/august-goal](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529229/45c30650/125262dc5/668678d9/1864648777/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk5OEZfRU9NX05GRl9FXzIwMTkwODMwX1YxUzNfUF9UMiJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI98F_EOM_NFF_E_20190830_V1S3_P_T2")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Ofirah Yheskel, Beto for America
subject: Politico just reported:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Politico just posted an in-depth report on the 2020 candidates’ schedules. You have to read what they said about Beto:
#
_Politico_ just posted an in-depth report on the 2020 candidates’ schedules. You have to read what they said about Beto:
* “Nobody has packed in near the number of stops as Beto O’Rourke.”

* “Notably, O’Rourke didn’t have the in-person fundraising burdens of several others.”

* “O’Rourke has been _everywhere_.”

**This is a campaign that’s going places...LOTS of places.** We can do that because we raise so much of our funds online. Beto doesn’t have to spend his time dialing for dollars or schmoozing at events, because most of our money comes from emails like this one.
[So today, we’re asking again: Can you donate $3? We need just 8,281 more contributions to reach the goal we told you about yesterday.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30396?refcode=ema20190830-52118&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=52118%2E444211%2E3NOyZW)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30396?refcode=ema20190830-52118&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=52118%2E444211%2E3NOyZW)**
When you run for office, the typical DC consultants will tell you you’re supposed to spend about HALF your day making fundraising phone calls or attending fundraising events. Because all of you have given so much to Beto online, we can keep the “call time” and fundraising events to a minimum. It’s a huge weight off Beto’s shoulders. It means he can hold more town halls and visit more states.
**But here’s the thing. If we don’t hit our August goal before the month is up, we’re going to be in trouble.** We don’t want to have to scale back our plans. We want to be able to run the all-out campaign we’re running.
[It’s critically important for us to get another 8,281 donations. Can you be one of the ones to step up and give $3 now?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30396?refcode=ema20190830-52118&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=52118%2E444211%2E3NOyZW)
Ofirah Yheskel
Deputy Comms Director
Beto for America

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=52118%2E444211%2E3NOyZW). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Dave Lindstrom
subject: We need action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lindstrom for Senate
body:
This summer, I’ve been busy traveling around Kansas, and if there’s one thing I’ve learned from the thousands of folks I’ve met it’s this: Our countr

Peter,
This summer, I’ve been busy traveling around Kansas, and if there’s one thing I’ve learned from the thousands of folks I’ve met it’s this:
Our country is under attack,**but Kansas is up for the fight.**
Peter, I am committed to defending our nation, and our state, from the attacks from the left. That’s why I’m running for Senate.
I believe that America is great. I believe that America deserves the safety and security provided by strong borders. And, of course, I believe America will NEVER be a socialist country.
But Peter, those beliefs make me a target.
The only way to deter this extreme liberal competition is to build sufficient funds to beat back their threat. **This August End of Month deadline is our best chance to do so**.
[**Can I count on you to help me build the resources I need to stop the radical left from taking over Kansas? A contribution of $100, $50 or $25 will make a huge difference!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=d408dfda8efc42d5a91c2f67e7dc250b&_e=VSR2Hl5KYMUXbqNfa2_LRooG-NSU2v6FIvgRIh7u7uKIXIpH_rgi1LB5jV5uzDtMxJTaGAMsTmJp3AwpaQIZuLSTR2BUM_fQ_GOTukuZk0F1liOtW88cKmGvzXw9ksfb-xcMlbkhk03xkrYxQzyrED8-MwwY43qctjXA3jK750r3BlxaU7-X_M6k3T-N0fw_6ndSmT-zrGmU2E4o8Wb7AOhtYodilFA12EZV7XaXjiK1KVtpZ7VDYENAE095KaWOUF30Q_N012v3R9q5s1r6PcafVbC3TKLd2MIq4yb1y6qVRc3URyL1lOufe6FnkqRKD8CZFvRrcQEtsRfhrZzidSs6U65e8oIgHqQONJACS9gnBSpQJIMOKqTcmz27qLzYrhu_tkmhryOzbJ5cVq1SK7WA-tHeCI6bjZdDaA3xLlE%3D)
****[DEFEND KANSAS: END OF MONTH FUND>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=d408dfda8efc42d5a91c2f67e7dc250b&_e=VSR2Hl5KYMUXbqNfa2_LRooG-NSU2v6FIvgRIh7u7uKIXIpH_rgi1LB5jV5uzDtMxJTaGAMsTmJp3AwpaQIZuLSTR2BUM_fQ_GOTukuZk0F1liOtW88cKmGvzXw9ksfb-xcMlbkhk03xkrYxQzyrED8-MwwY43qctjXA3jK750r3BlxaU7-X_M6k3T-N0fw_kkAJ4EcnzkFiA7fduH9hD6hXfYw3IYgxPPYsL7suBWmXkZUkSrJNUo3EKaZ9ouUV0Mo4km39xMaC5ez2YnzfB1jmCEYfmjvAfYdfLVkI4xZpUi2ZZUneBXyUnZfU3uUFPCONAByXTe48wbnztZymE-j1Uo8K9qbOFr2UlxJxk9tteU_PwEXpXWcQu6ThA1dtOV5b1Xn5M8rWGVmc0zUCuXDKrV0LvC_ALK8Yax2G1Zg%3D)****
---
In the Senate, I promise to stand with President Trump to:
* Secure our border and crack down on sanctuary cities
* Defend life from conception to natural death
* Roll back regulations and bad trade deals that give nations like China an edge

**[Peter, today I ask you to please consider helping us achieve our End of Month goal for August, to fight the liberal attacks and defend our values.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=caf0405f69f549dc9b1706e0cec6f81d&_m=d408dfda8efc42d5a91c2f67e7dc250b&_e=VSR2Hl5KYMUXbqNfa2_LRooG-NSU2v6FIvgRIh7u7uKIXIpH_rgi1LB5jV5uzDtMxJTaGAMsTmJp3AwpaQIZuLSTR2BUM_fQ_GOTukuZk0F1liOtW88cKmGvzXw9ksfb-xcMlbkhk03xkrYxQzyrED8-MwwY43qctjXA3jK750r3BlxaU7-X_M6k3T-N0fw_bKYMTCqESIdkJYzR2Nzxv4s9VFUgeavqFpI3CkGxzmF5ilCKdZk5xLoWCxUFZBp6FAw5CHfrsC6JbmdtEq6c0D3BLR8m6TaGKHvXp7YpHFswBki7G9V4PtLnm7Q5cafBgen3ieLCW6m_4xKvwS2jNz5zkUcWbUSJ6PjNFmQ5E-sycXsoeJS-0jI-jpZAUG7yegSPWKe_f5fEBEujF4brXAdj9g2Al2pQC89uWXdhHdo%3D)**

Thank you again for all your support, Peter. Together, we can do this!

Sincerely,
Dave Lindstrom
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Kansas

Peter, I am committed to defending our nation, and our state, from the attacks from the left. That’s why I’m running for Senate. I believe that America is great. I believe that America deserves the safety and security provided by strong borders. And, of course, I believe America will NEVER be a socialist country. But Peter, those beliefs make me a target. The only way to deter this extreme liberal competition is to build sufficient funds to beat back their threat. This August End of Month deadline is our best chance to do so. ** In the Senate, I promise to stand with President Trump to: Secure our border and crack down on sanctuary cities Defend life from conception to natural death Roll back regulations and bad trade deals that give nations like China an edge Thank you again for all your support, Peter. Together, we can do this! Sincerely, Dave Lindstrom Candidate for U.S. Senate, Kansas Paid for by Lindstrom for Senate

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: tough news
body:
We have two choices.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dea/4bef7a87/680e119f/287f118c/3797885574/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Good news:** This is a campaign powered by small-dollar donations and we are almost surely going to raise considerably more grassroots donations than Susan Collins does during this reporting period.
**Bad news:** Despite that fact, there's a chance we'll be outraised again. And that's because Susan Collins is relying almost exclusively on big donations from special interests, and our average donation is much smaller than hers.
If we're going to close the gap, we have two choices: either we generate even more donations, or donations we receive have to be slightly larger.
So, if you could make your first online donation -- of even just $3 -- we're going to close the gap, report a great number, and win this race. What do you say?
[**Can you make a $3 donation before our end of month fundraising drive comes to a close this weekend? This is important. If we can close the gap, we can win this race and flip this seat.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dea/4bef7a87/680e119f/287f1183/3797885574/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MzAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190830-full")
While Susan Collins spends her nights at high-dollar soirees like one hosted by Brett Kavanaugh's benefactor, we're running a campaign powered by people who simply want a Senate that puts the needs of working people first.
That's our campaign. And if you keep fighting, we're going to win.
All our best,
Team Gideon
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dea/4bef7a87/680e119f/287f1183/3797885574/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MzAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190830-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dea/4bef7a87/680e119f/287f1182/3797885574/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dea/4bef7a87/680e119f/287f1181/3797885574/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Younger Workers Report Biggest Gains in Happiness With Pay
body:
The share of American workers satisfied with their paychecks rose last year, and "the biggest leap came from millennials and Generation Z..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c8559e0485&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Younger Workers Report Biggest Gains in Happiness With Pay**

The share of American workers satisfied with their paychecks rose last year, and “the biggest leap came from millennials and Generation Z, whose enthusiasm for their compensation shot from 36% in 2017 to nearly 46% a year later,” Lauren Weber reports for _The Wall Street Journal_.

“In all, nearly 54% of U.S. workers said they were satisfied with their jobs in 2018, the highest share reported in more than two decades.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb361e5c45&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| President Donald J. Trump canceled a planned trip to Poland this weekend “to remain stateside as a potentially major hurricane takes aim at Florida,” Caitlin Oprysko reports for [_Politico_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce38ba27de&e=3ee4985eea). “'It's something very important for me to be here,” the President said, adding that he wants “to ensure that all resources of the federal government are focused on the arriving storm.” Vice President Mike Pence will travel to Poland in President Trump’s place.
---
|
---
| “Two years ago, former FBI Director James Comey came out with a book that celebrated himself as a paragon of ‘ethical leadership,’” George Washington University law professor Jonathan Turley writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d59fbf9f1e&e=3ee4985eea). “If that is the case, the new Justice Department inspector general report released on Thursday establishes that Comey is the very antithesis of the ethical leader he described. Comey was found to have violated both federal law and regulations for his own gain, and he made critical decisions that put personal over institutional interests.”
---
|
---
| Ever since President Trump insisted that China halt exports of illicit opioids to the United States, the flow of lethal fentanyl-style drugs coming to America from China has collapsed, David Fickling writes for [_Bloomberg_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e6f54c5edb&e=3ee4985eea). “It could be that 2019 is the year when the U.S. finally started to turn the tide in the opium war,” he says. “What’s more, the success may be coming as a result of that most improbable activity, cooperation between the U.S. and Chinese governments.”
---
|
---
| “To say that many liberal elites have all but given up on educating low-income minorities might seem like an overstatement. But when you consider the state of public education in our inner cities, and the priorities of those in charge, it’s hard to draw any other conclusion,” Jason Riley writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5821ddd36&e=3ee4985eea). The racial achievement gap is a main driver of inequality in New York City, for example, where Democrat Mayor Bill De Blasio is looking to shut down the charter schools where mostly low-income students have passage rates of greater than 90 percent for math and English.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f1f2e42636&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06c7f06df1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4e89fb517c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Thank You!!

On behalf of myself, Sen. Birdsell and Sen. Ward, I would like to thank everyone that made this week's celebration of Republican Women Senators such an overwhelming success! Thank you to Bob and Priscilla Clegg for opening up their lovely home and garden to us! Thank you to all of our wonderful sponsors and thank you to the nearly 90 people that attended the event. It was so great to see so many fired up Republicans ready to get to work. Now let's take back the Senate! Thank you again. Sen. Sharon Carson

subject: Tennessee has a choice →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Team Mackler
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa20e/18d6a294/4b1c6f2c/26d65a2a/4136290413/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | | | **AUGUST DEADLINE: ****24 HOURS** | | | [Chip in now](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa20e/18d6a294/4b1c6f2c/26d65a2b/4136290413/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA4MzAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190830?refcode=jme190830_m&recurring=true")
---
Right now, Tennesseans have a choice.
**There 's James: a different kind of candidate.** He's an outsider and combat veteran who stepped up to serve after 9/11. He's driven by a sense of duty to his country. He isn't taking money from corporate PACs, because he wants to fight for Tennesseans -- not wealthy donors or special interests.
**Or there 's his potential opponent: a candidate hand-picked by Donald Trump. **The Trump administration has overseen policies that have been uniquely harmful to Tennessee, including an influx of rural hospital closures, an inadequate response to the opioid epidemic, and a trade war of choice that hurts Tennessee more than any other state. We can't afford to have another senator more interested in serving their special interest bankrollers than in representing the people they're elected to serve.
Tennessee needs a senator who will stand up for what's right and stand up to a president when they're wrong.
We can win if everyone who wants change joins the team to make it happen -- our team.
[**_Chip in before our deadline tomorrow to join the team and help give Tennessee the leadership it deserves._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa20e/18d6a294/4b1c6f2c/26d65a2b/4136290413/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA4MzAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190830?refcode=jme190830_m&recurring=true")

body:
The polls are showing Andy leading Matt Bevin here in Kentucky!
|

| | | **BESHEAR FOR KENTUCKY
SUPPORTER RECORD**

Great news, Peter:

**The polls are showing Andy _leading_ Matt Bevin here in Kentucky! **Kentuckians are tired of the bullying, name-calling, and corruption coming from the Bevin administration and they're clearly ready for a change.

This team is working hard to make sure Andy's lead in the polls translates into a WIN on Election Day. From knocking doors and making phone calls to spreading Andy's message with ads on TV, the radio, and the internet, **there 's a lot of work to do** between now and November.

**And that work takes resources, Peter, which is why I 'm coming to you. Will you make a donation before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline to keep Andy's momentum going?**

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. name: Bill de Blasio
subject: We're almost there
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
Reaching this goal will help us to fight for working people across the country.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e6b/1630b3eb/5165023b/5f54b07a/3917136336/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=714_org_em_fr_seg1")
Friend,
Yesterday our team shared that we needed only 1,000 more contributions before the end of August to beat our financial projections and head toward the October debate cutoff with a big jolt of momentum. And people across the country have really responded -- we're now just 636 more contributions away from that goal.
**But this isn 't just about reaching goals and meeting deadlines. This is about our ability to fight for working people throughout America.**
I'm in this race to FIGHT for working people -- and that's why I'm asking for your support before the month ends tomorrow at midnight.
**[Contribute $1 today to help this campaign keep fighting for working people-- and to help beat our projections for August.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e6b/1630b3eb/5165023b/5f54b07a/3917136336/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=714_org_em_fr_seg1")**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e6b/1630b3eb/5165023b/5f54b07a/3917136336/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=714_org_em_fr_seg1")
Fighting for working people isn't easy. Every time progressives try to get something done, there's someone telling us to slow down, be quiet, or settle for less.
But in New York City, on one of the biggest stages in the world, we've proven progressives can win.
People said businesses would flee when we raised New York City's minimum wage to $15/hour and ensured everyone had the right to paid sick leave -- but we now have the strongest economy in our history. People said it was too ambitious to enact free, full-day pre-K for every child in the city, but we did it in less time than anyone expected.
We have no intention of slowing down when it comes to fighting for working people like you -- we're speeding up. But we can't do it without you.
**[Contribute $1 today to help us beat our August projections and do more to help working people.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e6b/1630b3eb/5165023b/5f54b07a/3917136336/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNCJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=714_org_em_fr_seg1")**
While others may be content to close the book on August, we're making a big push to grow stronger as we head into this new month. Your fellow supporters are stepping up to reach this goal, but we need everyone to come together right now -- including you.
Let's do this,
Bill

clean_body: Reaching this goal will help us to fight for working people across the country. "" Friend, Yesterday our team shared that we needed only 1,000 more contributions before the end of August to beat our financial projections and head toward the October debate cutoff with a big jolt of momentum. And people across the country have really responded -- we're now just 636 more contributions away from that goal. But this isn 't just about reaching goals and meeting deadlines. This is about our ability to fight for working people throughout America. I'm in this race to FIGHT for working people -- and that's why I'm asking for your support before the month ends tomorrow at midnight. "" "" Fighting for working people isn't easy. Every time progressives try to get something done, there's someone telling us to slow down, be quiet, or settle for less. But in New York City, on one of the biggest stages in the world, we've proven progressives can win. People said businesses would flee when we raised New York City's minimum wage to $15/hour and ensured everyone had the right to paid sick leave -- but we now have the strongest economy in our history. People said it was too ambitious to enact free, full-day pre-K for every child in the city, but we did it in less time than anyone expected. We have no intention of slowing down when it comes to fighting for working people like you -- we're speeding up. But we can't do it without you. "" While others may be content to close the book on August, we're making a big push to grow stronger as we head into this new month. Your fellow supporters are stepping up to reach this goal, but we need everyone to come together right now -- including you. Let's do this, Bill "" PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Preparing for Hurricane Dorian
body:
[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=8c77e4fa5d1a40aa90602e71babf95c8&_e=xFNFO0eL8a_-jZ2DTUgDyXGW7O8016DYqVnlB4wq-rQThuFEOarSNFNICMJO4pSPbh3dBwvhxwFU0P8GKJ0_ld_hn4x5I-h2wYyxVn-huXyaOpNYk3i2ar-nqYC_yD9iMkHzAaHfSmv20EJZKo1yCSd8WF6-I2UJlajH8ekrx5saDUrcVaKgKr9HpiA4qWvBnFlh_t3xeCkH8Sa8rGv_lXVBm4WfcQEfy8aHvbOUZwVUnc8ZvM8-XQlo3CVtBmOCviLyC72SGP1VOZOUSJ8AIQ%3D%3D) In case you missed it, I was able to sit down on CBS This Morning to discuss what it’s like to prepare a state for an incoming hurricane. With a hurricane likely to approach Florida this weekend, I was happy to offer some advice based on my firsthand experience as Governor. Click below to watch, and read on for what you should do to stay safe: [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=8c77e4fa5d1a40aa90602e71babf95c8&_e=xFNFO0eL8a_-jZ2DTUgDyXROitNbjjLZEvOOYJiRA94z-440RfXC9MHBHUktN1mIMjSfSNsTzhO8CZtboRAfXGtaQaMGhgY4EncXeWFsMtgN86RLFZz02MQoPKtUhzKHTrKvwU_Tztj6Ox4FvatS0CG7pC8rErwBzFfH6jcQ2Yk17yNfmAFB64mt3AnHQuWFaiichkeb0oCxLnZ6ZwhzyDTLBzpjLaXF0WiE28qppt4CvfIgnx_5Se7iKA2PrF7PlEH7xaGn94vfFbZ_QmBVo3nFKQJjkbr3XJeS-r9_7aOm9WpFtXck5hH9tU8_VCslCngkmgQVzJ8P20F8dziVHu_G-JJvOfpLK75sfX9G6of65oQZtO6bNTew4ELHbDIlJ9eHhRIe9BTch4QfYupb6w%3D%3D) **To FL lawmakers:**
* Over prepare, and don’t be afraid to evacuate your citizens. People might criticize you for doing too much,_but doing the alternative puts lives at risk._

* Sometimes you need to ask for forgiveness instead of permission. In an emergency, bureaucratic red tape can halt vital rescue efforts. Mobilize the resources you have to save lives, because state and federal agencies can’t aways be the answer.

**To the people of Florida:**
* You are the best first responders to your neighbors and friends. If you have a neighbor or relative that needs help that you can safely provide, be there for those around you.

I hope you will join me in praying for the people of Florida, and I hope politicians on both sides of the aisle will come together to give aid to those who need it. In times like this, _we must remember to put party last and lives first._ Sincerely, Bobby Jindal [ UNSUBSCRIBE HERE ](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=8c77e4fa5d1a40aa90602e71babf95c8&_t=YcCGpk0-DUkv8l1iF2y_leRsG7-9KIubzimZKRuPFIttPYjNV6QRBUV3QU0L8hYZN_A3R1U3Y7oUY-nIFbpjSS7uq-5lLrFvZIN7Ajr9PrpBljPJC0vJETJ_GWV5h4w9eFl32sBPuEE0OqW7EaXwQ0DyixGfjOEX5FUpTLeuGGw%3D) Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320
---

name: Tim Ryan
subject: [climate change] we must have this debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Climate change is not a Democratic or a Republican issue. **Climate change is an American issue.**

And right now is one of the most important issues facing our country. That's why I'm inviting the other presidential candidates to join me in a debate on climate change in Northeast Ohio.

We need to discuss this issue in front of an audience of steelworkers, miners, and others who would benefit from a green economy.

[**Sign on now. Join me in asking colleagues in the presidential primary to hold a climate debate in Youngstown, Ohio as a matter of priority. Add your name here.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9de4/5486deaa/3edbf039/dc83a71/415523572/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/climate-debate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Sign+on+now+Join+me+in+asking+colleagues&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190830_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190830_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190830_1_1")

[SIGN THE CLIMATE DEBATE PETITION](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9de4/5486deaa/3edbf039/dc83a70/415523572/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/climate-debate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+THE+CLIMATE+DEBATE+PETITION&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190830_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190830_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190830_1_1")
My friend, Governor Jay Inslee, did a great service to our country by elevating the issue of climate change during his presidential campaign. Millions of Americans now understand the future of not just our country -- but our planet -- is at stake if we do not take immediate action.

The current administration refuses to take the threat of climate change seriously. Rather than lead, this administration is full of climate-deniers who are putting their own selfish interests over those of the American people.

[**Climate change is not a left wing or right wing issue, it is an American issue - and that is why I'm asking the other candidates to join me in Ohio. Add your name today >>>**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9de4/5486deaa/3edbf039/dc83a73/415523572/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/climate-debate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Climate+change+is+not+a+left+wing+or+rig&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190830_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190830_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190830_1_1")

Thanks for your support on this critical issue.

Tim

|

name: Ed Markey
subject: From here on out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello,

August has been a big month for my campaign.

First, my friend and partner in the Senate, Elizabeth Warren, [_**endorsed my reelection campaign.**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc1c/693b8b0a/4566b0a0/72de9e54/2730368697/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-warren-endorsement?refcode=EM-083019_1&amount=27&recurring=true")

Then, 116 Massachusetts State Senators and Representatives -- 72% of the state legislature -- endorsed my campaign.

Now, we've also received the endorsements from NARAL Pro-Choice America, the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund, and the Sunrise Movement.

I'm humbled to have the support of so many friends and colleagues across Massachusetts for re-election.

But our work for victory is just getting started, and right now we need to show momentum and grassroots strength with our upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline.

_**[Before the banks close today, we need to bring in another $20,000 to fuel my campaign, and I hope you'll join me by making a $27 today.](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083019_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

From here on out, it's absolutely crucial that we hit every fundraising goal.

The RNC raised more than DOUBLE what Democrats raised last month.

That right-wing cash will make its way into Senate races like mine to fund relentless attacks.

If we're going to withstand the RNC's fundraising surge, we have to raise another $20,000 before the bank closes today.

**Our online supporters are our best chance to help us reach this goal by 5 pm. Can I count on you to rush $27 or more?**

_**[Before the bank closes, rush $27 or more to my campaign and help me stay in the fight for our values. We can't afford to miss a single deadline.](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083019_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Rob Flaherty, Beto for America
subject: BIG update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Every campaign’s gotta raise money. I’m proud of the way we do it. All our cashola is coming from “The People.”
#
Ok so last night we sent out an email announcing our goal of reaching 9,031 contributions by midnight on August 31. **Here’s where we’re at:**
[ ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30492?refcode=ema20190830-52155&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=52155%2E444211%2EaI4i0w)
**Charts! They’re good! 2,598 contributions down -- whatever 9,031 minus that number is left to go (I’m bad at math sorry)! I’m stoked**. **I wasn’t sure we’d be able to hit this goal, but now it’s looking increasingly likely if we can keep up the pace.**
[Can you add a $3 contribution right now? If 1-in-5 of you say “YES,” we’re gonna hit that goal in a matter of hours.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30492?refcode=ema20190830-52155&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=52155%2E444211%2EaI4i0w)
**[Add a contribution »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30492?refcode=ema20190830-52155&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=52155%2E444211%2EaI4i0w)**
Every campaign’s gotta raise money. I’m proud of the way we do it. Our money is coming from “The People.” People like you giving to emails like this one. We aren’t kowtowing to DC lobbyists or big political action committees. We don’t have a super PAC bankrolling us on the side.
It’s just me, and you, and Jessica from Allen, TX (hi Jessica!). It’s Neal in Los Angeles, CA (hi Neal!) and Mary in Morton Grove, IL (hi Mary!) and Artemis from El Paso, TX (hi Artemis!). That’s who funds this campaign -- and it’s a pretty dang special group of people who are ready to build a new kind of politics.
[SO... can we hit this goal? I feel like we have a good shot! Make a $3 donation right now to help us do it.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30492?refcode=ema20190830-52155&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=52155%2E444211%2EaI4i0w)
Rob Flaherty
Beto for America
**[Donate](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30492?refcode=ema20190830-52155&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=52155%2E444211%2EaI4i0w)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=52155%2E444211%2EaI4i0w). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Team Warren
subject: "Wait, wait, I'm really speaking to Elizabeth Warren?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Most people don't believe that it's really Elizabeth on the phone, because for the longest time, our political candidates have only made time to talk with the wealthy and well-connected. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529258/45c30650/13ab04b67/668613f2/3002533949/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Imagine this:

"Hello, it's Elizabeth Warren!"

"Oh, hello, is this a prank?"

"No, it's really me."

"Wait, wait -- so I'm really speaking to Elizabeth Warren?"

That's how Elizabeth's conversation with Felipe started when she called to thank him for being a grassroots donor.

Most people don't believe that it's really Elizabeth on the phone, because for the longest time, our political candidates have only made time to talk with the wealthy and well-connected.

But we don't think it's weird that someone running for president would call the people who pitch in $3, or $10, or $50, and thank them personally. In fact, we think that's how it should be done.

**We're up against our August end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow, and on this campaign, there 's one more reason to donate: Elizabeth might call you.**

**[Chip in now for a chance to get a call from Elizabeth just like Felipe did-- and help grow this grassroots movement at the same time!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529258/45c30650/13ab04b67/668613f5/3002533949/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk4N0ZfRU9NX0RPQ19UXzIwMTkwODMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI87F_EOM_DOC_T_20190830_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: Most people don't believe that it's really Elizabeth on the phone, because for the longest time, our political candidates have only made time to talk with the wealthy and well-connected. | | | "" Imagine this: "Hello, it's Elizabeth Warren!" "Oh, hello, is this a prank?" "No, it's really me." "Wait, wait -- so I'm really speaking to Elizabeth Warren?" That's how Elizabeth's conversation with Felipe started when she called to thank him for being a grassroots donor. Most people don't believe that it's really Elizabeth on the phone, because for the longest time, our political candidates have only made time to talk with the wealthy and well-connected. But we don't think it's weird that someone running for president would call the people who pitch in $3, or $10, or $50, and thank them personally. In fact, we think that's how it should be done. We're up against our August end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow, and on this campaign, there 's one more reason to donate: Elizabeth might call you. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" "" At the end of Elizabeth's phone call with Felipe, she said, "Here's how I look at it, Felipe. You make me stronger, and I make you stronger. We make each other stronger in these fights." That's the idea at the heart of the movement we're building -- person to person and family to family. name: SaraGideon.com
subject: We're "sad" that Brett Kavanaugh voted against blocking a law that could make it more difficult for women to get abortions.
body:
Women's rights. Gerrymandering. Citizenship.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802def/4bef7a87/6806a277/287f1159/4033739682/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Susan Collins is "sad" that her vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh has cost her votes. She'll be even sadder when Sara Gideon defeats her and becomes Maine's next U.S. Senator.**
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802def/4bef7a87/6806a277/287f1158/4033739682/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MzAtMi1mdWxsIn0=/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190830-2-full")****
Friends -
Susan Collins just told _Politico_ that she's "sad" her vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court has cost her votes.
Well Senator Collins, we're sad, too.
We're sad that Brett Kavanaugh voted against blocking a law that could make it more difficult for women to get abortions.
We're sad that you refused to listen to Mainers, even after they called on you to reject Kavanaugh.
Most of all, we're sad that you don't seem to trust women - women who spoke out against Kavanaugh.
Instead of regretting her vote for Brett Kavanaugh or apologizing for not listening to women, Susan Collins says she's "sad" about its impact on her chance of reelection. All she cares about is winning, so she can continue voting in line with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
Well we're saying, it's time for her to go:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign to defeat Susan Collins? Chip in before our end-of-month deadline hits this Saturday at midnight.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802def/4bef7a87/6806a277/287f1158/4033739682/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MzAtMi1mdWxsIn0=/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190830-2-full")
Mainers deserve a Senator who puts their needs first - and our campaign is going to be the one to give it to them.
Are you with us?
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802def/4bef7a87/6806a277/287f1158/4033739682/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MzAtMi1mdWxsIn0=/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190830-2-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802def/4bef7a87/6806a277/287f115f/4033739682/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802def/4bef7a87/6806a277/287f115e/4033739682/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**
