name: Team Ed Markey
subject: RE: Before the banks close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team: We wanted to check back in on this request from Ed. We must bring in another $20,000 for Ed's campaign before the bank closes, and right now we're about 73% of the way there.

_**[Will you rush $ or more and help us close the gap before 5 pm?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083019_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Read more from Ed Markey:
* * *
> Hello,
>
> August has been a big month for my campaign.
>
> First, my friend and partner in the Senate, Elizabeth Warren, [_**endorsed my reelection campaign.**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc1b/693b8b0a/457e57bf/72de9ead/2973905153/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyNyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-warren-endorsement?refcode=EM-083019_1&amount=27&recurring=true")
>
> Then, 116 Massachusetts State Senators and Representatives -- 72% of the state legislature -- endorsed my campaign.
>
> Now, we've also received the endorsements from NARAL Pro-Choice America, the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund, and the Sunrise Movement.
>
> I'm humbled to have the support of so many friends and colleagues across Massachusetts for re-election.
>
> But our work for victory is just getting started, and right now we need to show momentum and grassroots strength with our upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline.
>
> _**[Before the banks close today, we need to bring in another $20,000 to fuel my campaign, and I hope you'll join me by making a $27 today.](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083019_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> From here on out, it's absolutely crucial that we hit every fundraising goal.
>
> The RNC raised more than DOUBLE what Democrats raised last month.
>
> That right-wing cash will make its way into Senate races like mine to fund relentless attacks.
>
> If we're going to withstand the RNC's fundraising surge, we have to raise another $20,000 before the bank closes today.
>
> **Our online supporters are our best chance to help us reach this goal by 5 pm. Can I count on you to rush $27 or more?**
>
> _**[Before the bank closes, rush $27 or more to my campaign and help me stay in the fight for our values. We can't afford to miss a single deadline.](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083019_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: _
>
> _**[Donate $10 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=EM-083019_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $27 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=EM-083019_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $50 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EM-083019_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $100 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM-083019_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate $250 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EM-083019_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> _**[Donate another amount](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-083019_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
> Thanks,
> Ed

name: Michael Bennet
subject: sorry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Michael emailed you this morning about the DNC's debate rules. We're sorry to email you again, but it's crucial.

We'll be straightforward: we need you to chip in to Michael's campaign.

It's supposed to be up to early state voters to narrow the field of presidential candidates, but this year the DNC is trying to winnow the field before the first votes are cast.

[Because of their arbitrary rules cooked up in a back room, Michael and other qualified candidates will be kept from the national stage.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac34/134673f2/baa49b0/699628a4/3089900544/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B2_083019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:
---
| | I asked.
Speaker Pelosi asked.
Khizr Khan asked.
James Carville asked.
Deb Haaland asked.
Ted Lieu asked.
Gabby Giffords asked.
Paul Begala asked.
Now I'm asking again.

**That 's how absolutely critical this end-of-month deadline is to winning my race and flipping the Senate.**

Since I announced, I've watched President Trump and Mitch McConnell make unprecedented moves to steal this seat.

Now, more than ever, I need to know my strongest supporters are behind me and will defend our movement. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4c4/18e32a7f/524a2901/7bebe470/376507891/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190830_em_fr_b3_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $5 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4c4/18e32a7f/524a2901/7bebe470/376507891/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190830_em_fr_b3_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: They call this August recess?
body:
In August, Congress historically takes a little hiatus. The swamp in Washington drains (at least temporarily), and representatives and senators... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/they-call-this-august-recess?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_They Call This August Recess? _**
In August, Congress historically takes a little hiatus. The swamp in Washington drains (at least temporarily), and representatives and senators head home with the mission of hearing directly from their constituents. They call it "August recess."

For some congressional members from places that aren't Indiana, this might mean a real break. But if you know your Republican congressional delegation, you know taking a break isn't in their DNA. And if this is truly "August recess," then there's no doubt that they've seen this month as their chance to talk to as many Hoosiers as they can.

Just this week, for example, **Senator Todd Young, Senator Mike Braun** and **Congressman Greg Pence** held an Academy Day in Columbus for students interested in attending one of the nation's service academies.

Here's [a great list](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=988dabd65f&e=1acd9bb3d6) of some of **Senator Todd Young's** work this month -- including visiting Floyd Central High School to talk about raising the smoking age, meeting with economic development leaders in Shelby County and joining **Congressman Larry Buschon** at the Terre Haute Chamber of Commerce Luncheon.

**Senator Mike Braun** has been on his his 50-city Summer of Solutions Tour, which this week included speaking at the American Legion Convention in Indianapolis, and touring businesses in Spiceland, Richmond, Connersville, Rushville, Batesville and so many more places.

Make sure to check out the official Twitter feeds for each of our members of Congress (linked below), and, of course, you'll see news about each of them at the bottom of this newsletter each week. These are great ways to keep up-to-date on what our leaders are up to for Hoosiers:

[Senator Todd Young](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a72dbda02a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Senator Mike Braun](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=06cb50aaf0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Congresswoman Jackie Walorski](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=95c76f96ea&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Congressman Jim Banks](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2f2e164ea0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Congressman Jim Baird](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c381051dfb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Congresswoman Susan Brooks](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c820a062ba&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Congressman Greg Pence](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=029a6922fd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Congressman Larry Bucshon](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=83f041067a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Congressman Trey Hollingsworth](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=56a373ce3b&e=1acd9bb3d6)

So, next time you see one of these great leaders out and about, make sure to say hello and thank them for their hard work serving us all.

\- Chairman Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO** : _This week, Governor Eric Holcomb and Chairman Kyle Huper hosted Team Holcomb's annual G.O.Party in Speedway, a unique fundraiser that this year had a racing theme! _
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was **
---
|
---
|
---
---
| _**Skilling-Up Hoosiers & Promoting Health**_
**Governor Holcomb** had a busy week Putting People First, which included putting a spotlight on two of his biggest priorities as governor -- providing opportunities for ALL Hoosiers to skill-up and live healthier lives.
* On Monday, **Governor Holcomb** attended The Last Mile graduation ceremony at the Indiana Women's Prison, which is teaching incarcerated Hoosiers important tech skills (like coding) so they will have opportunities to contribute to the Hoosier workforce on reentry and keep Indiana’s recidivism rate low. In fact, graduates of the program have a 0% recidivism rate!
* Yesterday, **Governor Holcomb** unveiled a new plan at Fishers High School to reduce vaping among Indiana's youth. Vaping has increased more than 300 percent since 2012, and the Surgeon General has labeled the increase in use of e-cigarettes among youth a dangerous epidemic. Learn more about the plan [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=581dd3a85d&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

---
|
---
| |
---
---
| _**Welcome Home, Vice President Pence**_
On Wednesday, **Vice President Mike Pence** returned home to Indiana. While it was only for a day, he had a full schedule meeting with Hoosier and American heroes.
* **Vice President Pence** spoke at the American Legion's 101st National Convention. President Trump and Vice President Pence will always fight for our nation's veterans and heroes.
* **Vice President Pence** also met with members of the Indiana State Police and thanked them for their service and dedication to protecting Hoosiers across the state.

It is always an honor to have **Vice President Pence** come back to Indiana!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Fall Dinner 2019: Celebrating Our Military _**
This year's [Team Holcomb Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c4c6804b0d&e=1acd9bb3d6) is one you won't want to miss! We're excited to welcome **Congressmen and combat veterans Jim Baird, Brian Mast** and **Dan Crenshaw** as the event's special guests on October 14 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

These three American heroes have made so many sacrifices in the name of freedom. Of course, we already know Indiana's own **Congressman Jim Baird** , and you may remember **Congressman Crenshaw** from when he was unnecessarily mocked on Saturday Night Live, but this trio made national headlines when Congressman Mast's [tweet](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ec3b72c460&e=1acd9bb3d6) "5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American." went viral.

Help us celebrate our military by booking your tickets for the [Team Holcomb Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a2e05d1282&e=1acd9bb3d6) now!
[\--> Reserve your seat here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5931dde43f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| **_National Federation of Republican Women Convention
Coming to Indiana!_** Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

Learn more about the convention [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ab319c3558&e=1acd9bb3d6), learn about sponsorship opportunities [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ce94ab6085&e=1acd9bb3d6), and register to attend the national convention [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c8e4ebf8c4&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

---

[October 23](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9ce1fbec18&e=1acd9bb3d6): Huntington County GOP "Under the Dome"

clean_body: In August, Congress historically takes a little hiatus. The swamp in Washington drains (at least temporarily), and representatives and senators... | | | | | | | | They Call This August Recess? In August, Congress historically takes a little hiatus. The swamp in Washington drains (at least temporarily), and representatives and senators head home with the mission of hearing directly from their constituents. They call it "August recess." For some congressional members from places that aren't Indiana, this might mean a real break. But if you know your Republican congressional delegation, you know taking a break isn't in their DNA. And if this is truly "August recess," then there's no doubt that they've seen this month as their chance to talk to as many Hoosiers as they can. Just this week, for example, Senator Todd Young, Senator Mike Braun and Congressman Greg Pence held an Academy Day in Columbus for students interested in attending one of the nation's service academies. Here's of some of Senator Todd Young's work this month -- including visiting Floyd Central High School to talk about raising the smoking age, meeting with economic development leaders in Shelby County and joining Congressman Larry Buschon at the Terre Haute Chamber of Commerce Luncheon. Senator Mike Braun has been on his his 50-city Summer of Solutions Tour, which this week included speaking at the American Legion Convention in Indianapolis, and touring businesses in Spiceland, Richmond, Connersville, Rushville, Batesville and so many more places. Make sure to check out the official Twitter feeds for each of our members of Congress (linked below), and, of course, you'll see news about each of them at the bottom of this newsletter each week. These are great ways to keep up-to-date on what our leaders are up to for Hoosiers: So, next time you see one of these great leaders out and about, make sure to say hello and thank them for their hard work serving us all. \- Chairman Kyle Hupfer PHOTO : This week, Governor Eric Holcomb and Chairman Kyle Huper hosted Team Holcomb's annual G.O.Party in Speedway, a unique fundraiser that this year had a racing theme! | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | Skilling-Up Hoosiers & Promoting Health Governor Holcomb had a busy week Putting People First, which included putting a spotlight on two of his biggest priorities as governor -- providing opportunities for ALL Hoosiers to skill-up and live healthier lives. On Monday, Governor Holcomb attended The Last Mile graduation ceremony at the Indiana Women's Prison, which is teaching incarcerated Hoosiers important tech skills (like coding) so they will have opportunities to contribute to the Hoosier workforce on reentry and keep Indiana’s recidivism rate low. In fact, graduates of the program have a 0% recidivism rate! Yesterday, Governor Holcomb unveiled a new plan at Fishers High School to reduce vaping among Indiana's youth. Vaping has increased more than 300 percent since 2012, and the Surgeon General has labeled the increase in use of e-cigarettes among youth a dangerous epidemic. Learn more about the plan ! | | | | Welcome Home, Vice President Pence On Wednesday, Vice President Mike Pence returned home to Indiana. While it was only for a day, he had a full schedule meeting with Hoosier and American heroes. Vice President Pence spoke at the American Legion's 101st National Convention. President Trump and Vice President Pence will always fight for our nation's veterans and heroes. Vice President Pence also met with members of the Indiana State Police and thanked them for their service and dedication to protecting Hoosiers across the state. It is always an honor to have Vice President Pence come back to Indiana! | | | Fall Dinner 2019: Celebrating Our Military This year's is one you won't want to miss! We're excited to welcome Congressmen and combat veterans Jim Baird, Brian Mast and Dan Crenshaw as the event's special guests on October 14 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis. These three American heroes have made so many sacrifices in the name of freedom. Of course, we already know Indiana's own Congressman Jim Baird , and you may remember Congressman Crenshaw from when he was unnecessarily mocked on Saturday Night Live, but this trio made national headlines when Congressman Mast's "5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American." went viral. Help us celebrate our military by booking your tickets for the now! | | | National Federation of Republican Women Convention Coming to Indiana! Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis. Learn more about the convention , learn about sponsorship opportunities , and register to attend the national convention ! | | Upcoming Republican Events : Pike GOP Ice Cream Social : Reagan Rally : Hamilton County Fall Dinner : Brown County GOP BBQ : National Federation of Republican Women Convention : Huntington County GOP "Under the Dome" : Orange County Fall Dinner **Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at mailto:info@indiana.gomailto:info@indiana.go! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. 101 W. body:
The right wing just launched a super PAC specifically for this race. They're not even trying to hide the fact that they plan to spend millions in dark money to try to hold on to this seat. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e7/691c9bd/6e63d80f/11a7b978/4291006001/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, we just got word: **The right wing just launched a super PAC specifically for this race. They 're not even trying to hide the fact that they plan to spend millions in outside money to try to hold on to this seat.**

John announced this campaign just over a week ago, and between this news and Cory Gardner sitting on nearly $5 million in the bank, we're working hard to build this campaign up as fast as we can so we can go toe to toe with the other side.

**Doing that means reaching tomorrow 's monthly fundraising goal and then some.** [**_Can you help make that happen by rushing in a donation now?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190830_FTH_20190830-fr-FTH-EOM3-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190830_FTH_20190830-fr-FTH-EOM3-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $10 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20190830_FTH_20190830-fr-FTH-EOM3-all_all_expresslane10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $25 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_20190830_FTH_20190830-fr-FTH-EOM3-all_all_expresslane25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $50 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20190830_FTH_20190830-fr-FTH-EOM3-all_all_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $100 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20190830_FTH_20190830-fr-FTH-EOM3-all_all_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190830_FTH_20190830-fr-FTH-EOM3-all_all_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") Gardner's party allies and his corporate PAC donors won't stand by and let this seat slip through their fingers. They'll fight back with everything they've got--and we have to, too.

[**_Can you chip in today so we can take on the newest super PAC and be ready for what 's coming our way?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190830_FTH_20190830-fr-FTH-EOM3-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
The Finance Team
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190830_FTH_20190830-fr-FTH-EOM3-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") **_**_** **_**_**

We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e7/691c9bd/6e63d80f/11a7b96b/4291006001/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e7/691c9bd/6e63d80f/11a7b96e/4291006001/VEsHAg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

body:
| | |
---
| Team, have you entered for a chance to join Cory and be at the debate in person? **[Chip in $1 -- or whatever you can -- and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win a ticket for you and a friend to be Cory's guests at the next debate in Houston -- flight and lodging on us!](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190830-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190830_BHQ_20190830-fr-BHQ-contestbump-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The debate stage is finalized. We know who will be on the stage, so now it's time to see who will be in the audience. And we'd love for you to be there. **[Want to join Cory in Houston for the September debate? Chip in right now and you'll be automatically entered for the chance to win a trip for you and a guest to watch up close.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190830-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190830_BHQ_20190830-fr-BHQ-contestbump-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** You won't want to pass up this chance to witness history in person. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by August 31, 2019. name: Steve Beshear
subject: FWD: less than two days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
It's almost September, and that leaves Andy with only two months until the big day.
|
---
| | Peter,

My son, Andy Beshear, is running for governor and the election is coming up sooner than you might think (Election Day is November 5th!). Andy and his team have set themselves an end-of-month goal, and with less than two days left before the deadline, they're not quite where they want to be.

So, here's my ask: can you donate whatever you can to help Andy and his team make up the difference before the end of the month?

It's almost September, and that leaves Andy with only **two months** until the big day. Here's the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-augeom.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557ab2/ad6dc73/14d0e03a/db441ba/44805328/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-augeom?refcode=20190830.2nd__233__&amount=15")**

Thank you so much,
Steve Beshear \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Steve Beshear**
Subject: Re: less than two days left
Date: Fri, Aug 30, 2019 at 8:32 AM
> Eric, I'd be more than happy to send an email to Andy's supporters. Always glad to help out in any way I can!
>
> I can tell Andy's definitely been busy. Saw that he went to the Plumbers and Pipefitters Local 633 in Owensboro the other day. Good to see that he's leaving no Kentuckian behind.
>
> Keep up the good work,
> Steve From: **Eric Hyers, Campaign Manager**
> Subject: less than two days left
> Date: Fri, Aug 30, 2019 at 7:57 AM
>> Governor Beshear, it's Eric. Thanks again for all your help with Andy's campaign! I have a favor to ask: we have a pretty big end-of-month fundraising goal coming up in less than two days, but we're still short of the amount we need to raise.
>
> I was going to ask Andy to shoot an email to his supporters asking if they could help us out, but he's been busy all month crisscrossing the state talking to folks (earlier this week he was in Henderson and Paducah unveiling his infrastructure plan).
>
> Since he's tied up, I was hoping you could send the email instead? It'd be much appreciated if you could.
>
> \-- Eric

---
|
---
[](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557ab2/ad6dc73/14d0e03a/db441b8/44805328/VEsE/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://www.facebook.com/AndyBeshearKY/") [](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557ab2/ad6dc73/14d0e03a/db441bf/44805328/VEsF/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://twitter.com/AndyBeshearKY")

Beshear/Coleman 2019
P.O. Box 4278
Louisville, Kentucky 40204

[Unsubscribe](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557ab2/ad6dc73/14d0e03a/db441bc/44805328/VEsC/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://action.andybeshear.com/unsubscribe")

| | _Contributions or gifts to the Beshear/Coleman 2019 campaign are not tax deductible. We may accept contributions from an individual totaling up to $2,000 per election cycle (the May Primary and November General are considered separate elections). State law prohibits contributions from corporations; from any person contributing another person's funds; from foreign nationals who lack permanent resident status; and from state government contractors. By contributing, you affirm that your contribution is from your personal funds and not from funds otherwise prohibited by law. To comply with state law, we must use best efforts to obtain, maintain, and submit the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals and their spouses, when personal contributions exceed $100 per election cycle. Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019. Lindy Karns, Treasurer._
---

Last year, Democrats came within **single digits** of flipping Florida's 15th Congressional District blue.
The incumbent, Republican Ross Spano, is potentially facing MULTIPLE federal investigations for illegally accepting $180,000 last year.
**But Spano has no intention of stepping down, in fact, he 'll be relying on GOP dark money groups and PACs spending millions of dollars to protect his seat.**
[**Adam 's counting on us to make sure he doesn't fall short of his major fundraising goal. Rush in a TRIPLE-MATCHED donation towards our $5,600 goal tonight! >>**](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hattersleysplit?refcode=314_EM_FR_190830_HattersleySplit2_U2_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+Adamrsquos+counting+on+us+to+make+sure+h&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190830_HattersleySplit2_U2_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190830_HattersleySplit2_U2_X2")

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4718/4bd7760e/4065120c/77e180e4/2195402340/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190830_HattersleySplit2_U2_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190830_HattersleySplit2_U2_X2")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4718/4bd7760e/4065120c/77e180e3/2195402340/VEsHAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=15+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190830_HattersleySplit2_U2_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190830_HattersleySplit2_U2_X2")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4718/4bd7760e/4065120c/77e180e2/2195402340/VEsHAw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=16+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190830_HattersleySplit2_U2_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190830_HattersleySplit2_U2_X2")

"Delighted to see my friend and fellow Navy veteran Adam Hattersley enter the race to represent Florida's 15th congressional district." \-- Mayor Pete - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Mayor Pete is throwing his full support behind the Democratic scientist running in Florida's most competitive House race! "" Adam is a Bronze Star Navy veteran with a background in aerospace engineering who is running against a scandal-ridden climate change denier. He needs our help right now. He 's still short of his End of Month fundraising goal -- So we're stepping up to help Adam raise $5,600 before his deadline tomorrow night! "" "" | **| | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Last year, Democrats came within single digits of flipping Florida's 15th Congressional District blue. The incumbent, Republican Ross Spano, is potentially facing MULTIPLE federal investigations for illegally accepting $180,000 last year. But Spano has no intention of stepping down, in fact, he 'll be relying on GOP dark money groups and PACs spending millions of dollars to protect his seat.** "" | | "" Thank you, 314 Action | "" | | Paid for by 314 Action Fund, "", not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. 314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country. If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, ""

| | | | [ ](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=02dhKE93GZuRor4noAOCTgda5-2FpiD2FpA4ziC2RKLJtR4YLysO-2BOXl6A7cMg1kptH42-2BIqYZAG85RWhBxe-2FpxVNB0EKK6r-2BHXrtE5RX8UVj5clGP-2BmlJKZ9ZqnVRz-2B5-2FbriU-2BlxwiP4Vo8I1183qs57fo0g2Jy8Vhxx6gK-2B7i8s-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2F2O-2Bg11QYH3EVuvxXgjfXqzn55HnMLzMQueashAZcp7dloRXjcDs5aGdMrXhDh7AruUI-2B8qixrxHXCuk51SRbNih0-2BR2HwT-2FF2kXfpuo0GIBvAzdt9KCCpQrp-2FMa9GURifXt61UBPas48Seot-2B4WwmCcxCyVB3AGZ4FviQMsjK9M-2FDtDDeWZI4tcePI12hy42NRVU77Eg-2Fq4S4J7YoCnmFfa2xT-2F7WCzSsRoCMOFzOXIXyqJj7RwEFrBqC-2B7E-2BnNiMPKQ8lsD2sBYdgOPvbrksKnmrvMWdKk5mIf6G-2BGn-2FsAE43Jv8reZXl0OfnWzDPd6JQgXAO02miAuERc57UkyIQ-3D-3D)

| Hey Yang Gang --
---
| It’s that time again -- our end-of-month deadline is coming up in a few days. So I took a deep dive into our finances, which means math and spreadsheets!

**I’ve got some good news and some bad news. Let’s start with the bad news -- we’re behind on our August end-of-month goal.** And if we don’t reach our goal by Saturday night, we’re not going to be able to make the big investments we need in the early primary states, which are critical.

The good news, Yang Gang -- you can help us get there.

**If everyone reading this pitches in our average donation of $30.71 today, we can hit this goal in no time.**

[We know we’ve asked a lot from this team already -- and we’ve set an ambitious goal -- but we have to hit it if we’re going to win and put Andrew in the White House. Can you pitch in?](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQ02lV0-2B-2FAsZCh9lzrV5waF336SCiCpNhiC1bHSNpM7K2o-2BsMMqjzCtiB-2F-2BhqlGSYQonz8-2FV3OUnWyoI8ibugGv-2FjH1BXkx5qV4wxR-2BvqSiQn0m7sI-2FUvNrVK8pE-2B18gCt9ZCki1HecbPozCDgIaKXqbuEyGP6jo-2FelK2C5j0q9Q99vtcRJW3x3RgId-2FdDbNDkmLtbnGHtNP6YxMU4GTrPQeigHwGtNla9gIfF-2FBbmqwMFyTrSZltMRD-2FJR8e-2BvhKKUy90myn7lyiOJ8Ojjs-2B2XE-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2F2O-2Bg11QYH3EVuvxXgjfXqzn55HnMLzMQueashAZcp7dloRXjcDs5aGdMrXhDh7AruUI-2B8qixrxHXCuk51SRbNih0-2BR2HwT-2FF2kXfpuo0GIBvAzdt9KCCpQrp-2FMa9GURifXt61UBPas48Seot-2B4WwmD4loPo27vQpCILEZ6ABK3EYl-2BxOG-2FS6GQnBecPwx4-2BV5yr3vYvE-2FJF6c6g6ATiV3GHoA5KtaWsvE19Z2iD-2Fu632df0KG3qVkMWPJOeOYTK7XdoF6v4D23AxZ9ma67hLcjmluh0zCv0zAW5GKcs5IjfxtEKbxsavtQZw4RwXsKptUR0fFHSc2RAVy-2FmFQCrfBw-3D-3D)

clean_body: Our end-of-month deadline is coming up. | | | | | Hey Yang Gang -- | It’s that time again -- our end-of-month deadline is coming up in a few days. So I took a deep dive into our finances, which means math and spreadsheets! I’ve got some good news and some bad news. Let’s start with the bad news -- we’re behind on our August end-of-month goal. And if we don’t reach our goal by Saturday night, we’re not going to be able to make the big investments we need in the early primary states, which are critical. The good news, Yang Gang -- you can help us get there. If everyone reading this pitches in our average donation of $30.71 today, we can hit this goal in no time. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you! Carly Reilly Finance Director Yang2020 | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. | | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | All rights reserved. body:
Mitch McConnell has never been more at risk of losing his seat
|
---

| | Everyone keeps asking me if we can actually win Colorado and oust Moscow Mitch from the Senate.

Here's 3 reasons why I say yes:

**1)** Mitch McConnell has never been more at risk of losing his seat thanks to a challenge from Amy McGrath --a dedicated public servant just like me.

**2)** Even Fox News admits that Democrats are closing on McConnell's lead in the polls.

**3)** Nate Silver himself says Democrats can win the Senate if we win my race here in Colorado.

But I'm up against the most important End of Month Deadline of my entire campaign so far.

I can't overstate the urgency -- if we want to flip the Senate, we need to fill this budget gap.

Can I count on your $19 before tomorrow's deadline? | | [**Donate $10 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827fe/232dfd1/80abc6b/62a1352e/945677096/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190830_em_fr_b3_baer_all&amount=10&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

Elizabeth doesn't spend time wooing billionaire executives for donations, so if our numbers are still behind where they need to be, she isn't going to call them up to fill in the gaps of our budget.

Since we only rely on grassroots donors to power this movement, missing this goal would mean real consequences. If we fall short, we'll have to scale back some of the critical work that needs to be done in the upcoming weeks -- like buying ads, hosting community events, and visiting more states to talk about big, structural change.

[**Before tomorrow's deadline, make your first contribution to ensure we can make every single necessary investment in the months ahead.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529253/45c30650/13a493f97/66861aff/2070566675/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk4M0ZfRU9NX0dPTF9XXzIwMTkwODMwX1YxUzJfUF9UMSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI83F_EOM_GOL_W_20190830_V1S2_P_T1")

We have a big August fundraising goal to hit by tomorrow, and we're still tracking behind where we need to be. At the beginning of each month, when it's time to take a look at our budget and make more plans, we make investments based off the donations our grassroots supporters make to emails like this one. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Elizabeth doesn't spend time wooing billionaire executives for donations, so if our numbers are still behind where they need to be, she isn't going to call them up to fill in the gaps of our budget. Since we only rely on grassroots donors to power this movement, missing this goal would mean real consequences. If we fall short, we'll have to scale back some of the critical work that needs to be done in the upcoming weeks -- like buying ads, hosting community events, and visiting more states to talk about big, structural change. name: =?utf-8?q?Bill=E2=80=99s_iPhone?=
subject: I'm trying to hire more staff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
Friend — sorry for the Friday night email but this is a critical moment for our campaign. We’ve got Trump on the ropes and we want to keep him there. My team tells me we need to raise another $6,009 before midnight Saturday if we want to hire more staff. Let me tell you, we need all the help we can get. Can you chip in right now to help us reach our goal? You can use this secure link right here: **[CLICK HERE](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARxAIrSpjtY--bK6hG6CMcAU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_eom_2_2nd&n=1)** Thanks,
Bill Sent from my iPhone \---- Forwarded message ---- **From** : Team Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : August 29, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARxAIrSpjtY--bK6hG6CMcAU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_eom_2_2nd&n=2) Friend — once again Donald Trump is showing _**he’s afraid of our movement**_. Earlier this week he went on another one of his unhinged Twitter rants about his challengers. Here’s what he said: [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARxAIrSpjtY--bK6hG6CMcAU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_eom_2_2nd&n=3) Talk about a typical Trump cheap shot. Seems like he’s referring to the time, _more than 20 years ago_ , when Governor Weld fell ill with the flu while receiving an Honorary Degree at a prestigious college. Cheap shot aside, if you dig a little deeper it's clear these tweets mean we’re getting under his skin. It means we have to keep the momentum going.**It means we’ve got a shot to beat him.** **But we can’t do it alone — we’re relying on supporters like you to help carry us through this campaign.** We don’t have the luxury of Donald Trump’s loose morals, wealthy friends, and cabal of cronies willing to go along with just about any corrupt deal in exchange for campaign donations. We’re looking to raise another **$12,553** from supporters like you by **midnight Saturday** if we want to hit our critical end-of-month fundraising goal and continue to build on the momentum we’ve established in New Hampshire, Iowa, and around the country. If we don’t hit this goal, we risk losing ground, and **having to put off hiring more staff that will help us reach out to voters in critical early primary states.** [**Can you be one of the first ten donors to help us reach our critical end-of-month goal by donating $10, $20, or whatever you can today?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARxAIrSpjtY--bK6hG6CMcAU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_eom_2_2nd&n=4) Thanks for helping us get there,
Team Weld | | [HELP US HIRE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARxAIrSpjtY--bK6hG6CMcAU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_eom_2_2nd&n=5)
---
Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.weld2020.org/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_eom_2_2nd&n=6).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_eom_2_2nd&n=7) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_eom_2_2nd&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190830_eom_2_2nd&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Jen O'Malley Dillon
subject: They’re spending BIG against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
In just a second, I’ll ask you (again) to donate to Beto. But first, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why donating right now is so important.
#
In just a second, I’ll ask you (again) to donate to Beto. But first, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why donating right now is so important.
**The truth is that we could be massively outspent if we don’t act now.** Other candidates are pouring BIG money into TV and digital ads:
* Joe Biden just booked $339k more in TV ads in Iowa.
* Kamala Harris is up with another $117k in TV ads.
* Tom Steyer, the self-funder, spent a staggering $12 million on ads!

So when we set a goal of 9,031 grassroots contributions before the month is out, it’s because we know that’s what we need to stay competitive. Right now, we are about 81% of the way there. Can you help us out?
[Add a $3 contribution right now to help us reach our goal. It’s on us to ensure Beto has the resources he needs to compete.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30513?refcode=ema20190830-52192&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=52192%2E444211%2EoFwV0u)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30513?refcode=ema20190830-52192&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=52192%2E444211%2EoFwV0u)**
We didn’t start with a multi-million dollar bank account from past campaigns like Kamala Harris, Bernie Sanders, or Elizabeth Warren. Other candidates might be spending like crazy, but Beto is extremely well-positioned. Thanks to all your online donations, we’re one of the handful who qualified for the next debates!
Still, we know everyone will be watching closely to see what we can raise in the final hours of this month. They want to know if this campaign is a strong contender, and whether or not we can show off exciting fundraising numbers is a big part of that.
[Will you help us reach our goal of 9,031 contributions? No matter what you can give today, every little bit helps.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30513?refcode=ema20190830-52192&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=52192%2E444211%2EoFwV0u)
I’m so proud of the way we’ve run this campaign. No big super PACs — in fact, no PACs at all! No corporate sponsors or D.C. lobbyists by our side. It’s just us — Americans who give a dang and want Beto to win.
Thanks for chipping in today.
Jen O'Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=52192%2E444211%2EoFwV0u). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Ryan Furlong
subject: We're still short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We've got just one day left in August, and we still haven't hit our fundraising goal for the month. Let's show the GOP we are a force to be reckoned with.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190830EOM3-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, with just one day to go, we still need to raise $21,748 of our $25,000 goal.

Hitting our fundraising goals is critical to funding the organization we need to build across Minnesota if we're going to take on the unprecedented attacks we will face from Mitch McConnell, Jason Lewis, and the Republican party.

Republicans have started to organize around the state and promised to be a force to be reckoned with, and we cannot be silent.

**[Tina needs your help. Please give $10 now so we can close our $21,748 budget gap before midnight tomorrow.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190830EOM3-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

With your help, we can show that we are unafraid to take on Jason Lewis and the Mitch McConnell money machine. We need to be able to fund everything from ads to supplies for our volunteers to use when talking with thousands of voters at their doors.

**[Give it all you can, and donate any amount before midnight tomorrow. It is vital that you step up so we can meet our critical $25,000 goal.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190830EOM3-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you for everything,

Ryan Furlong
Campaign Manager | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190830EOM3-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4e866/c1f7015/643d6871/11462463/2920241959/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
